claims: No implementation required for this task

outcome.confidence_rationale: Direct read-only inspection confirms README.md exists with content and no implementation files are in the worktree. Gate rule is narrow and fully met.

assumptions_to_verify: Task scope is README-only probe with no hidden implementation mandate
README content is sufficient for gate purpose
contradictions_checked: Claude claim README.md exists vs filesystem: consistent
Gate no-implementation rule vs repo contents: consistent
README review-only instruction vs gate scope: consistent
critical_review.strongest_objection: Acceptance relies on a minimal filesystem check with zero external evidence receipts or planning artifacts.

outcome.summary: README.md exists and is the sole repo artifact; no implementation required or present. Gate criteria satisfied.
